notes.purpose: Leadership Rotation Engine seed list. Scanner ranks both current holdings and possible replacements.
notes.workflow: Run python leadership_scanner.py before python generate_ladder.py.
notes.bear_market_focus: In Bear Mode, prioritize names that fall less than QQQ and recover faster. Do not average down weak leaders blindly.
notes.v43_rule: Separate Approved Universe from Active Holdings. Generate ladders only for Active Holdings, plus manually approved active allocation candidates. Watch candidates are scanner-only.
notes.active_holdings_rule: Tomorrow ladders are generated only for active holdings with quantity/value or explicitly approved active allocation candidates. META remains excluded unless manually reactivated.

removed_from_active_universe.META: Removed in V43 because user no longer owns it; no buy/sell ladder should be generated unless manually reactivated.
